prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约12521名，2023年约12621名，2024年大幅前移至10160名，2025年回落至11793名。近四年位次波动较大，2024年出现明显前移后2025年又有所后移，整体呈震荡格局，2025年基准位次约11793名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2022-2025年均为6人，2026年大幅扩增至33人，扩增幅度达450%。如此显著的扩招将大幅增加招生名额，对报考竞争格局产生重大影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 宁夏大学为211工程、双一流建设高校。软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第170名、2022年第167名、2023年第149名、2024年第128名、2025年第134名、2026年第137名，整体排名稳中有升，学校综合实力和认可度逐步提高；2022年声誉评价偏负面（涉及食堂宿舍问题），2026年声誉评价为中性/混合（图书馆管理相关）。抖音热度总排名第104位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约7.7万，在211高校中曝光度偏低，未出现明显报考热度信号。历史投档异常记录中未见宁夏大学相关断档信号；宁夏大学在第五轮学科评估中未有A-及以上等级学科记录，优势学科主要集中在草学、民族学、水利工程等特色领域，整体学科竞争力在211高校中处于中后段。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 天津市2026年普通高考考生约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，考生规模明显扩大，整体竞争加剧。天津市本科批；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川市，距天津较远，属于跨省招生。该校在天津招生占比极小（2025年仅6人），2026年扩至33人后占比有所提升，但整体仍属小众选择，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11793名、2026年招生计划大幅扩增450%以及天津市考生总数增长约14%等因素，扩招带来的名额增加是主导因素，按供需弹性模型计算后位次大幅后移；同时考虑学校软科排名持续提升、考生总数增加等修正因素，预测2026年最低位次约43334名，区间42834-43834名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年宁夏大学在天津市综合类大幅扩招至33人，位次预测区间较宽。位次在预测区间内（42834-43834名）的考生可将该校作为稳妥选择；位次优于区间下限（42834名以内）可重点冲刺智能科学与技术、计算机科学与技术等一档专业；位次在区间中段可主攻法学、人工智能等二档专业；位次接近区间上限可考虑经济学、机器人工程等三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2022 was approximately 12521, in 2023 approximately 12621, in 2024 it significantly advanced to 10160, and in 2025 it fell back to 11793. Rankings fluctuated greatly over the past four years, with a notable advance in 2024 followed by a retreat in 2025, showing an overall oscillating pattern. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 11793. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Tianjin was 6 students from 2022 to 2025, but in 2026 it will expand significantly to 33 students, an increase of 450%. Such a substantial expansion will greatly increase enrollment slots, significantly impacting the competition landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University Rankings have been steadily rising: 170th in 2021, 167th in 2022, 149th in 2023, 128th in 2024, 134th in 2025, and 137th in 2026. The overall ranking is stable with an upward trend, indicating gradually improving comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving cafeteria and dormitory issues), while in 2026 it was neutral/mixed (related to library management). Douyin popularity ranks 104th overall, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 77,000, showing relatively low exposure among 211 universities and no clear signal of application heat. No historical abnormal admission records related to Ningxia University were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ningxia University had no disciplines rated A- or above. Its advantageous disciplines are mainly in characteristic fields such as Grassland Science, Ethnology, and Water Conservancy Engineering, placing its overall disciplinary competitiveness in the middle-to-lower segment among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Tianjin is about 82,000, an increase of approximately 14% from 71,938 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in candidate numbers and intensified overall competition. Tianjin undergraduate batch. Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, far from Tianjin, making it a cross-province enrollment. The university's enrollment proportion in Tianjin is very small (only 6 in 2025), and after expanding to 33 in 2026, the proportion increases but remains a niche choice, with regional preference having limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11793, the 450% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the approximately 14% increase in the total number of candidates in Tianjin, the increase in slots due to expansion is the dominant factor. According to the supply-demand elasticity model, the ranking will significantly retreat. Additionally, considering correction factors such as the continuous improvement in Soft Science rankings and the increase in candidate numbers, the predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is about 43334, with a range of 42834-43834.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Ningxia University's comprehensive enrollment in Tianjin will significantly expand to 33 students, resulting in a wide predicted ranking range. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (42834-43834) can consider the university as a safe choice. Those with rankings better than the lower limit (within 42834) can focus on Tier 1 majors such as Intelligent Science and Technology and Computer Science and Technology. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range can target Tier 2 majors like Law and Artificial Intelligence. Those with rankings near the upper limit can consider Tier 3 majors such as Economics and Robotics Engineering as a backup.
